# TM 9-2330-392-14&P — M1101 1.25-ton Trailer
## Section 5.9.2 — Cooling System

**Component:** intervehicular cable (NATO slave)
**Echelon:** Operator (Crew)
**Discrepancy class:** Class II (monitor at next PMCS)
**Primary part NSN:** `6150-01-866-8621`
**Associated seal kit NSN:** `5330-01-761-7122`
**Gasket NSN:** `5330-01-952-3159`
**Torque spec:** _no torque (visual/wear inspection only)_
**Lubricant / fluid:** n/a

### Failure indication
Outer jacket abrasion — replace if conductors visible.

### Procedure
1. Park on level ground; set parking brake; chock wheels per OPER manual.
2. Disconnect NATO slave cable; lock-out / tag-out.
3. Reference Figure 6-2. Kingpin assembly with upper/lower bushing locations. for orientation.
4. Remove intervehicular cable (NATO slave); inspect bore, mating face, and adjacent harness for collateral damage.
5. Install replacement P/N `6150-01-866-8621`. Replace gasket `5330-01-952-3159` — single-use item.
6. Torque to spec (_no torque (visual/wear inspection only)_). Final torque after a 5-minute settle.
7. Refill / top off with n/a. Bleed system per Section 12.4.
8. Operational check: 10 minutes idle + road test per PMCS Table 2-1 sequence 14a.

### Verification
- No visible leak at 1.5x operating pressure for 60 seconds.
- Connector resistance < 0.1 ohm to chassis ground.
- Record PM action in GCSS-MC EM record under SLEP code SLEP-C3.

> _alt-text figure description_: Figure 6-2. Kingpin assembly with upper/lower bushing locations.

figure: Figure 12-3. Turbocharger lubrication circuit schematic.
